name: Stonegate Ranch
description: The Stonegate Ranch is an exclusive mid-luxury residence designed to combine timeless architecture, premium craftsmanship, and functional living. With 2,580 SF of living area and 3,650 SF total under roof, the home features 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, a private office, butler's pantry, spacious open-concept living areas, and a 3-car garage.

name: Maragogi
tagline: Designed for comfort, flexibility and modern living
description: The Maragogi model was developed to offer maximum comfort, space, and versatility in a home inspired by coastal living. With 2,400 SF of living area and 3,244 SF total under roof, this spacious 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom residence is one of our largest models, designed for families who value generous areas and flexible living.

name: Oakview Ranch
tagline: Affordable ranch-style living with modern farmhouse charm
description: The Oakview Ranch is an affordable ranch-style home thoughtfully designed to deliver comfort, functionality, and exceptional value. With 1,695 SF of living area and 2,301 SF total under roof, the home features 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, an open-concept great room, a spacious kitchen with island, dining area, laundry room, and a 2-car garage.

name: Grumari
tagline: Independent in-law suite — flexibility and income potential
description: The Grumari In-Law Suite is an innovative home designed to combine comfortable family living with exceptional flexibility and income-generating potential. With 1,891 SF of living area and 2,333 SF total under roof, the residence offers 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, including a fully independent in-law suite with its own entrance, kitchen and laundry.

name: Meaipe
tagline: Smart duplex design for maximum value
description: Meaipe is a smart duplex model designed for maximum value, featuring 1,321 SF of living area per unit and 2,832 SF total built area. Each unit offers 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 2 garage spaces, making it the perfect investment property for those seeking dual-income potential.

name: Arpoador
tagline: Elegance and efficiency with premium finishes
description: The Arpoador model was designed for those who value quality in every square foot. With 1,891 SF of living area and 2,333 SF total under roof, this 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom residence delivers an exceptional living experience through integrated and naturally lit spaces.

name: Ubatuba
tagline: Gourmet kitchen with vinyl flooring throughout
description: The Ubatuba model features a gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a quartz waterfall island, complemented by vinyl flooring throughout. With 1,679 SF of living area and 2,224 SF total under roof, this 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence is one of our most popular models for investors and families alike.

name: Copacabana G2
description: Copacabana G2 sets a new standard in residential design with 1,840 SF of living area and 2,653 SF total under roof. This bold 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence brings a refined architectural approach with spacious interiors, high-end finishes, and a layout designed for both comfort and entertainment.

name: Copacabana G3
tagline: The evolution of our most iconic model
description: Copacabana G3 represents the pinnacle of our design philosophy, taking everything exceptional about the G2 and elevating it further. With 1,840 SF of living area, 2,929 SF total under roof, and a 3-car garage, this 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence is the ultimate expression of modern luxury living.

name: Leblon G2
tagline: Refined living with vinyl flooring throughout
description: Leblon G2 was designed for those who appreciate refined living spaces that balance elegance with everyday functionality. With 1,695 SF of living area and 2,412 SF total under roof, this 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence features vinyl flooring throughout that adds warmth and durability to every room.

name: Leblon G3
description: The Leblon G3 takes luxury to the next level with 1,695 SF of living area, 2,412 SF total under roof, and a spacious 3-car garage. This 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence is the definitive family home, combining premium design with the practical features that modern lifestyles demand.
